title: FIRST® and Zebra Technologies Empower Students With Real-Time Robotics Competition Insights

title: Zebra Technologies to Release First Quarter Results on May 3
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), an innovator at the edge of the enterprise with solutions and partners that enable businesses to gain a performance edge, will report its first quarter financial results on Tuesday morning, May 3, 2022. The company will also host a conference call to discuss these results on the same day at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). title: Wall Street Analysts Predict a 39% Upside in Zebra (ZBRA): Here's What You Should Know
text: The mean of analysts' price targets for Zebra (ZBRA) points to a 38.9% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
